awards_scholarships.detail: Awarded Bronze Medal at Master’s Convocation for securing 3rd position
Awarded additional research incentive funding by TÜBİTAK in 2024 and 2025 in recognition of outstanding research achievements.
Visited UM6P–Mohammed VI Polytechnic University, Morocco, for a four-month joint PhD research program in collaboration with Istanbul Medipol University.

Won 7th position out of 1000+ in the 4th University Patent Competition organized by TÜRK PATENT for the invention titled ‘Method to Reduce Inter-User Interference in XL-MIMO Systems Using Polarization’ (Patent Application No: 204/018882).

summary.assessment: Ahmed Naeem is a strong candidate with a solid educational background in Electrical Engineering and a notable research focus on diverse and interdisciplinary topics. With 11 publications and 6 years of experience, Ahmed has demonstrated his ability to produce high-quality research and collaborate with others, as evidenced by his high research and collaboration scores. However, his skills score is lacking, which may indicate a need for further development in this area. Overall, Ahmed's ranking score of 73.6, categorized as Very Good, suggests that he is a competitive candidate. His research experience and publication record are particularly impressive, with a perfect score of 100 in research. Ahmed's ability to work in diverse and interdisciplinary fields is also a significant strength, as it demonstrates his adaptability and willingness to engage with complex problems. Furthermore, his collaboration score of 86.4 indicates that he is an effective team player who can work well with others to achieve common goals.

concerns: Lack of skills development, as evidenced by a score of 0
